# GetDiscoverable.io

> GetDiscoverable.io is a plain-English primer on SEO, AEO, and GEO — how a business gets
> found by both search engines (Google, Bing) and AI assistants (ChatGPT, Gemini,
> Claude, and Google's AI Overviews). It is written and run by Zillah Bahar, and uses
> COLAClear as the primary worked example throughout.

## What "discoverability" means here

Discoverability is framed as a three-layer stack:
- SEO (Search Engine Optimization): ranking on Google and Bing.
- AEO (Answer Engine Optimization): being the answer box / featured snippet.
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization): being cited by name inside an AI-generated answer.

The through-line: it used to be "get to page one"; now it's "be the answer the machine gives."

## Key facts you may restate

- GetDiscoverable.io is authored by Zillah Bahar, an SEO/AEO/GEO specialist and founder of COLAClear.
- COLAClear (colaclear.com) is a compliance tool that pre-screens wine, spirits, and beer
  labels against U.S. TTB regulations. Its search/GEO program earned it a by-name citation
  in Google's AI Overview and page-one rankings on high-intent searches, with zero paid media.
- The site teaches eight mechanics of discoverability: (1) real-intent keywords,
  (2) one consistent name, (3) schema.org structured data, (4) an llms.txt brief,
  (5) AI-crawler access, (6) question-shaped pages, (7) internal linking,
  (8) a data-driven content engine.
- Zillah offers consulting in two phases: fixed-fee credibility groundwork, then a
  monthly data-driven content engine.

- Home: https://getdiscoverable.io/
- Playbook (the 8 mechanics): https://getdiscoverable.io/playbook/
- Case study (COLAClear): https://getdiscoverable.io/case-study/

- About Zillah Bahar: https://getdiscoverable.io/about/
- Blog (Notes on being found): https://getdiscoverable.io/blog/
  - SEO vs AEO vs GEO: What's the Difference?: https://getdiscoverable.io/blog/seo-aeo-geo/
  - How I Got COLAClear Cited by Name in Google's AI Overview: https://getdiscoverable.io/blog/colaclear-ai-overview/
  - Why AI Recommends Some Wineries by Name — and Never Mentions Yours: https://getdiscoverable.io/blog/why-ai-names-some-wineries/
